Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

Seems technically OK.  The question Oleg and I discussed is whether the fact that this will now increment two counters will cause other problems?

However, at a minimum the test needs a version check to avoid spurious failures when running against older servers.

parents.subject: LU-8116 build: Fix libmount configure message

commit.subject: LU-8150 mdt: Track open+create as mknod
commit.message:
LU-8150 mdt: Track open+create as mknod

Regular files created with mknod are tracked, but most files are
created as an open with create intent. Track this as a mknod also.

Signed-off-by: Matt Ezell <ezellma@ornl.gov>
Change-Id: I8f6ab9d91d0b31062c7f73f8394a1b12f7963f1c
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/20246
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
